📌 [...] Report

Hava

The synced focus sessions are such a thoughtful touch, turning solo Pomodoros into something that actually feels shared. Love that the café collection ties consistency to a tangible reward instead of just another streak counter.

Report

Ilya Shkurko

Grindoro

Grindoro

Maker

@hava3cfd Thank you! That’s exactly the feeling I was aiming for: enough shared presence to make focusing feel less lonely, without adding the distractions of a social network.

And yes, the cafés are meant to turn consistency into something you can actually collect and look back on, together with your focus stats from each week.

Report

12 [...] Report

Yuki_Code1

Synchronized focus sessions add a nice social accountability layer that solo Pomodoro apps usually lack. How does matching work — do you get grouped with strangers working on similar goals, or is it more for pre-formed groups/friends?

Report

Ilya Shkurko

Grindoro

Grindoro

Maker

@ark\_y\_k Right now, there’s no goal-based matching or private friend groups. Everyone joins the same global session at the scheduled start time - usually on the hour or half-hour - alongside whoever else is focusing then.

I also don’t want users spending time deciding which room or group to join. Their main task is to focus, so the social layer should require almost no setup.

results.title: Session: Start your momentum by focusing in 25-minute sessions | Product Hunt
results.content:
SocialX

5.0

Based on 1 review

Review Session?

Session is praised for its balanced approach to the Pomodoro technique, offering a perfect blend of simplicity and functionality. Users appreciate its ability to block distractions and track progress effectively, with features that allow for daily analysis of both time and mental well-being. The app is noted for its excellent support and regular updates, making it a standout choice among Pomodoro timers. Overall, Session is highly regarded for enhancing focus and productivity.

I'd consider buying this product only for a fixed price. I don't need sync or cloud features. I don't expect any support, unless it stops running (which I don't expect to happen often). For this product and benefits it offers subscription is insanely expensive and completely unjustified. There are plenty of Pomodoro timers that offer 80% plus of what Session does, but for a fixed price and without claiming to be more what they actually are.
